name: Entra ID Duplicate Usernames
description: Detects active Entra ID identities sharing the same username/login.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.user_principal_name)) AS username, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.user_principal_name), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.user_principal_name)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Normalize account identifiers to unique usernames and remove duplicate access identities.
